metadata.title: Breeder profile web research - July 15 batch 3
metadata.notes: Public-web research only. Employer, breeder, agent, licensee, and legal-holder roles remain distinct; no external communication was made.

profiles.ownershipType: corporate breeder affiliated with private family company
profiles.ownershipSummary: Fall Creek breeder and EMEA operations leader; no evidence of personal title to the associated blueberry rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Operations Manager EMEA and co-inventor within Fall Creek's blueberry program.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Fall Creek for sourcing. Preserve cultivar-level applicant and holder names; partnership context only.

profiles.ownershipType: public university breeder and university-spinout leader
profiles.ownershipSummary: University of Cordoba professor emeritus and Pomologia S.L. president; institutional and spinout entities hold or commercialize the rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Late-career olive breeder with institutional program continuity.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional licensing and partnership profile, not a personal acquisition target. Verify the Pomologia cap table and cultivar-by-cultivar license map.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Driscoll's Mexico breeder; Driscoll's is the documented applicant or holder and the individual is not a standalone owner.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active breeder within a deep corporate strawberry program.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's and exclude as a standalone acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipType: academic breeder with historical institutional rights
profiles.ownershipSummary: UBC professor whose historical grape portfolio is associated with University of Udine and IGA; current employment does not transfer those rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Senior academic viticulture researcher with laboratory continuity.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional partnership profile. Verify VCR exclusivity and later-cultivar rights before assigning ownership.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Cornell AgriTech researcher and co-inventor in the joint Cornell-USDA Geneva rootstock program; Cornell administers licensing.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Late-career evaluator with an explicit program handoff to Gennaro Fazio and future scientists.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional licensing profile, not an acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Long-retired USDA-ARS small-fruit geneticist; later joint Driscoll records do not establish personal ownership.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Completed institutional succession; no current operating role established.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Benchmark and institutional-history profile; exclude as an independent target.

profiles.ownershipType: former public-institution breeder; current status unresolved
profiles.ownershipSummary: Avichai 'Avi' Perl was an Israeli Ministry of Agriculture chief scientist associated with ARO/Volcani; Big Pearl was assigned to the State of Israel.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Late-career breeder with no clearly verified current institutional role.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Identity and current-affiliation review. Do not infer personal title from breeder status.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Former director of CRA/CREA Forli; CREA and program partners are the documented holders, not Faedi personally.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Historical leader whose program responsibility has passed to Gianluca Baruzzi and the current CREA team.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public-program benchmark; exclude as a personal target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Peruvian operating subsidiary of Camposol Holding PLC within Grupo DC; 2024 disclosures report Dyer-Coriat family control.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Second-generation family board with professional management.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Likely outside the target size and structurally complex. Retain as a company/legal-owner profile and benchmark.

profiles.ownershipSummary: CREA research director and Forli site head; CREA and documented project partners hold or license the associated cultivars.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active institutional leader with a named multidisciplinary breeding team.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional partnership and licensing profile, not a personal acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipType: public national research executive and former breeder
profiles.ownershipSummary: Hidenori Kato is a NARO executive and former fruit breeder; NARO owns and administers the institutional varieties.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Moved from direct breeding into management while the NARO breeding team continues.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institutional profile; partnership and licensing context only.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Luis Miguel Rodriguez Martinez is a Driscoll's Mexico breeder; Driscoll's is the applicant or holder.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active mid-career breeder within a large corporate team.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's and exclude as a standalone target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Australian blueberry breeder associated with Costa's berry program; CostaExchange is the documented assignee.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Legacy breeder whose program has widened to newer Costa breeders.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Costa Group / BluGenix. Already-acquired corporate platform, not a personal target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Co-founder of nonprofit IGA and vice president of foundation-owned IGATech; institutional entities hold the associated grape rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Board and multi-researcher structure reduce key-person risk.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional licensing profile; not an equity acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipType: corporate R&D leader in acquired private company
profiles.ownershipSummary: Former Berryplant/Berrytech co-owner and current R&D leader following Fall Creek's June 2026 acquisition.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Next-generation Rubus breeding leader integrated into Fall Creek.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Already acquired and in integration. Preserve Berrytech as the legal rights entity where shown.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Director and documented shareholder of Ben Dor Fruits & Nurseries Ltd; the company normally holds or licenses the rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Yossef and Ido Ben-Dor provide visible family continuity; no formal succession plan found.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Independent family-company target. Verify full cap table, financial scale, licenses, and trademark ownership.

profiles.ownershipType: cooperative technical leader and public-program breeder
profiles.ownershipSummary: CAV Centro Attivita Vivaistiche technical leader with historical CREA breeding activity; rights vary by CREA and program partner.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Part of a broader cooperative and institutional team.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Cooperative and institutional relationship profile; resolve cultivar-by-cultivar title.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Alessandra Lillo is a Driscoll's variety development manager; Driscoll's is the applicant or assignee.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Member of a broad corporate breeding team with low personal concentration.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's; no standalone ownership evidence.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Miyoshi Agri-Tech breeder; NARO and Miyoshi entities are documented holders of the associated strawberry material.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Multi-breeder corporate and institutional structure reduces personal succession risk.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Miyoshi Agri-Tech; verify Japanese name variants and holder mapping.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Italian societa semplice founded in 2022 and operated within the Mattivi family group; exact partner percentages are not public.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Luciano, Fatiha, and Luca Mattivi provide visible multigenerational involvement.
profiles.webResearchNotes: High-priority private breeding target. Verify partners, financials, title chain, and current trademark statuses.

profiles.ownershipType: public research breeder with university commercialization
profiles.ownershipSummary: USDA-ARS breeder at Geneva with Cornell affiliation; Cornell handles variety commercialization and Geneva trademark licensing.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Current program leader following earlier Cummins and Aldwinckle generations; broader team provides continuity.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institutional and licensing profile, not an acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: University of Cordoba UCOLIVO researcher; UCO and named commercial assignees or licensees hold the associated rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active researcher in a multi-person, long-duration institutional program.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional licensing profile; verify each cultivar's holder and territory.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Danilo Bernardini is a breeder at BerryLAB, co-administrator of New Fruits, and operator of Bernardini Danilo Consulenze; rights and licenses vary by cultivar.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Key-person profile with a documented transition to Bernardini and Lucilla Danesi; no next breeder identified.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Potential key-person tuck-in, but only through verified entity interests and cultivar-level title.

profiles.ownershipType: public research director in multi-institution consortium
profiles.ownershipSummary: IRTA Mas Badia director and HOT84A1 co-breeder; IRTA and partner institutions hold the rights while commercial parties manage brands.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Multi-institution pipeline reduces key-person exposure.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional consortium and licensing profile, not a personal target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Amy Marie Edmondson is associated with Driscoll's strawberry breeding; Driscoll's is the applicant or assignee.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Member of a broad co-breeder team with low personal concentration.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's; no evidence of standalone ownership.

profiles.ownershipType: legacy breeder in acquired corporate platform
profiles.ownershipSummary: Legacy Royal Berries and Atlantic Blue breeder; associated rights sit with Royal Berries entities now within Hortifrut.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Corporate succession followed Hortifrut's 2021 acquisition of Atlantic Blue.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Already acquired legacy profile. Preserve record-level title; do not treat the breeder as an independent owner.

profiles.ownershipType: independent originator with rights assigned to private consortia
profiles.ownershipSummary: German orchardist and breeder whose principal GS 66 and GS 62 rights sit with DOSK and Li Imke GbR rather than personally.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Family orchard succession signal exists, but no formal plan or current independent IP company was verified.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Low standalone IP value unless remaining know-how or unassigned rights are identified.
